hero.sub: 11 years on the market. 10,000+ clients. The official hub for Motorola, Hytera and Radiocom RC in Uzbekistan.

industries.title: Industries
industries.overview_sub: We designed and tuned radio systems for six key industries in Uzbekistan. Pick yours — we'll show what fits.

horeca.name: HoReCa
horeca.desc: Hotels, restaurants, events. Discreet earpieces, clean channels.
horeca.problem: Staff loses contact across noisy floors and between levels. Guests overhear crew chatter.
horeca.solution: Compact PMR radios plus discreet earpieces. Instant coordination — no noise, no license required.
pains: Waiters can't hear the kitchen at peak hours
Regular phones die halfway through a shift
horeca.quote: Guests no longer hear what's happening in the kitchen. Shifts got calmer and turnover went up — the team clears tables faster.

faq.q: Do I need a PMR license?
faq.a: No. PMR446 models run on free channels without any permit.

faq.q: How many radios for a restaurant?
faq.a: Usually 4–6: host, floor manager, chef, bar, waiter, storeroom. We'll count on-site for free.

faq.q: Can I try before I buy?
faq.a: Yes — 7-day free test on your site.

construction.name: Construction
construction.desc: Massive sites. IP67 ruggedness, long-range coverage.
construction.problem: Dust, vibration, kilometers between crews. Regular phones don't survive and don't cover the site.
construction.solution: Rugged DMR radios with IP67/IP68 protection and repeaters for full site coverage.
pains: Foreman can't reach crane ops or fitters
Phones crack, drown, die in dust
Cell signal vanishes past concrete walls
construction.quote: We used to lose 2 hours a day chasing foremen. Now — press a button, the whole shift hears it. Paid off in a month.

faq.a: Yes. Motorola DP4400/DP4600 run from −30°C to +60°C.
Only for sites over 500 m or with heavy structure. We assess on-site.

faq.q: What if a radio ends up in wet concrete?
faq.a: IP68 survives submersion. We restore or replace under warranty.

security.name: Security
security.problem: You need encrypted comms with GPS shift tracking and a panic button.
security.solution: DMR radios with encryption, emergency button and GPS positioning. Everything visible to the dispatcher.
pains: Officers go off the radar — nobody knows where
Open frequencies can be scanned by anyone
Panic alerts go via phone — 30–90s lost

outcomes.l: Alarm to full shift in <1 s

security.quote: We standardized on encrypted DMR across all our sites. Dispatch sees every officer, and the panic button has already saved us twice.

faq.a: With AES256, effectively no. Keys rotate over-the-air.
Outdoors, yes. Indoors we fall back to last-known-position.

faq.q: Where does the panic button go?
faq.a: To everyone on the channel plus the dispatch console with coordinates.

mining.name: Mining · Oil · Gas
mining.problem: Huge areas, hazardous zones, strict intrinsic-safety requirements.
mining.solution: ATEX-compatible DP4800/DP4600 radios with SLR8000 repeaters. Full pit coverage plus dispatcher link.
pains: 3 km pit — regular radios can't reach across
Standard electronics banned in Ex zones
Underground crew loses contact with surface
mining.quote: Radiocom rolled out the DMR network across the pit in 3 days. Second winter running — zero downtime.

faq.a: We handle full licensing with State Comms of Uzbekistan.
3 years with annual service at our center.

transport.name: Transport · Logistics
transport.problem: The dispatcher loses drivers outside the city. Cellular is expensive and drops.
transport.solution: PoC radios (Caltta E690) with nationwide LTE coverage plus in-vehicle DM4600 base stations.
pains: Driver in Bukhara — Tashkent dispatch can't reach
Convoy comms via phone speakerphone only
transport.quote: Moved the whole fleet to PoC — 40% saved on comms, and dispatch sees every driver on the live map.

faq.q: Does PoC work on highways and mountains?
faq.a: Anywhere with LTE — 97% coverage across UZ.

faq.q: Can we mix PoC with traditional radios?

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing · Warehousing
manufacturing.problem: Shifts across many zones, industrial noise, foremen need instant coordination.
manufacturing.solution: DMR system with a repeater and group calls. Rugged PDAs for warehouse operations.
pains: Foremen can't hear each other over machine noise
Warehouse ops walk paper between shelves
Shift doesn't know what happened at another zone
manufacturing.quote: DMR plus PDAs rolled out in a week. Storemen dropped the paper, picking sped up almost 2×.

faq.q: Do radios work in noisy shops?
faq.a: Yes — active noise suppression keeps voice clear at 100 dB.
Yes, out of the box plus custom builds if needed.
2 to 7 days depending on plant size.

tradein.desc: Bring your worn-out walkie-talkie. Our specialists match it to a fresh Motorola or Hytera model at a massive discount.

catalog.sub: Professional and amateur radios, PoC devices, accessories and PDAs. Request a quote — a manager will build a proposal for your case.
catalog.empty: No models match the selected filters.

form.title: Request quote
form.sub: Leave your contacts — a manager will reach out within 15 minutes during business hours.
form.name: Your name
form.success: Request sent. We'll be in touch.

poc.sub: Push-to-Talk over LTE and WiFi. Instant comms with no infrastructure to build — group calls, GPS and multimedia included.
poc.vs_sub: Real trade-offs by parameter, not marketing.

design.title: We engineer the network for your site.
steps: Equipment selection matched to your parameters
Frequency licensing with State Comms of Uzbekistan

rental.title: From 1 day to 5+ years.
rental.desc: Motorola with accessories, spare batteries and pre-tuning on Radiocom's own licensed nationwide frequencies.

service.sub: Warranty and post-warranty service for Motorola, Hytera and Vertex Standard radios. Original parts, fixed pricing, diagnostics on dedicated hardware.

policy.q: Returns of goods in proper condition
policy.a: The buyer may cancel the order before receipt and within 5 days after — provided the goods retain packaging, seals, tags and receipt.
If defects are found — within 24 hours of purchase — replacement or refund per the Uzbek consumer protection law.
From 7 days for obvious factory defects up to 2 months for delivery to remote territories.

lead.sticky_sub: We deliver, tune and pick up
